title: Accepted Sprint Artifacts To Knowledge Base

history.note: Created PRD for accepted sprint artifacts to knowledge base.

Contract A1-A8 + DoD verified complete (8 acceptance + 6 stop rules + 7 deliverables). Skipped PM PRD revision (PRD@92lines used as-is) and skipped design/plan.md (builder has full contract). Prior state: {'status': 'drafting', 'phase': 'spec', 'handoff_to': 'planner'}. Hand to builder_main.

plan.md (140 lines, 9KB) produced from prd.md + contract.md. 2 slices: S1 exporter foundation -> S2 hook+backfill+status+tests+docs. Per-slice gates G1/G2 mapped to contract A1-A8; round-retry triggers and stop rules carried forward. Door-gate cleared.
